name: Vikas Varma Pokala
location: Toronto, Canada | Open to relocate to India
summary:
Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building backend and full-stack applications using Java, Go, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Spring Boot, Node.js, React, REST APIs, GraphQL, SQL, and AWS.
Worked on production healthcare and enterprise systems, including secure APIs, AI-assisted documentation, transcription workflows, private-data retrieval, and middleware integrations.
skills: Languages: Java, Go, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL
Frontend: React.js, Redux, React Router, React Query / RTK, HTML5, CSS3 / LESS, Bootstrap, Axios
Backend: Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Hibernate / JPA, Node.js, Express.js, JAX-RS, REST APIs, GraphQL, Microservices
Databases: MySQL, Oracle, MongoDB, Firebase Firestore
Cloud / DevOps: AWS, S3, Lambda, KMS, Transcribe, CloudWatch, Docker, Jenkins, Git, Maven, Gradle, CI/CD
Security: Spring Security, JWT, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, RBAC, scoped access control, API key lifecycle management
Testing / Tools: JUnit, Jest, Mocha, Chai, Cucumber, Selenium, Postman, GraphQL Playground
AI / LLM Integrations: OpenAI, Gemini, Whisper, Pinecone, RAG workflows, private-data retrieval
Architecture / Practices: Microservices, Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA), clean architecture, SOLID principles, event-driven systems, webhook integrations, Agile / Scrum

experience.description:
Built backend and full-stack features across Java/Spring Boot services, React applications, and integration layers for healthcare and enterprise products.
Developed REST and GraphQL APIs, business logic, middleware flows, and service integrations using Java, Go, Node.js, Python, SQL, and AWS.
Worked with MySQL, Oracle, MongoDB, and Firebase Firestore to support transactional systems, real-time application state, and backend data workflows.
Implemented authentication and authorization flows using JWT, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, RBAC, AWS KMS, and scoped access controls.
Built AI-assisted clinical documentation workflows for CliniScripts, reducing average note generation time from ~60s to under 30s.
Improved speech-to-text processing with AWS Transcribe, provider routing, streaming logic, and fallback handling, reducing transcription cost from ~$1.00/hour to ~$0.07/hour.
Built a private-data copilot workflow with file upload, Pinecone embeddings, and retrieval-based context injection for user-specific document Q&A.
Worked on Go and GraphQL middleware for TELUS marketplace systems supporting IoT connectivity, SIM-related flows, ordering, and device-management operations.
Used Docker, Jenkins CI/CD, CloudWatch, unit testing, integration testing, debugging, and code reviews to support production reliability.

projects.name: CliniScripts - AI-Powered Clinical Documentation Platform
projects.description:
Worked on a clinical documentation platform focused on secure transcription, structured note generation, and clinician-facing workflows.
Built AI-assisted note generation workflows that reduced average note generation time from ~60s to under 30s.
Improved transcription processing with AWS Transcribe, streaming logic, provider routing, and fallback handling, reducing cost from ~$1.00/hour to ~$0.07/hour.
Built private-data retrieval features using file upload, Pinecone embeddings, and context injection for grounded assistant responses.
Supported secure backend workflows using scoped authorization, AWS S3, AWS KMS, CloudWatch monitoring, and request-control mechanisms.

projects.name: TELUS Marketplace - IoT Connectivity and Device Management Systems
projects.description:
Worked on backend and middleware systems supporting IoT connectivity, SIM-related flows, ordering, and device-management operations.
Built Go and GraphQL middleware between frontend applications and Java backend services for integration flows and response shaping.
Supported Java microservices, REST APIs, SQL-backed workflows, API contracts, debugging, and integration testing.
Improved production readiness by fixing integration issues across Go/GraphQL middleware and Java backend services.
